label: Caskkeeper's Prism Alcove
description: Caskkeeper's Prism Alcove constitutes a narrow sleeping chamber cut into the dark crystalline backing of The Refraction Cask, its walls polished to meridian-true planes that catch only the thinnest spill of the corridor’s glare. A low berth of fused shardglass is recessed into a faceted niche, with storage slots scored as rectilinear channels that maintain the tavern’s disciplined geometry. Lattice-aligned louvers above the doorway admit a fixed band of refracted color, while the remaining volume holds to the Confluence’s engineered shadow, producing a stable, quiet dimness. Acoustic crystal baffles continue here in smaller panels, suppressing footfall and keeping the space sealed from the bar’s hard-spectrum light-map.
